title: Dekton 9PC Ball End Short Hex Key Set | Ball Point Heads for Up to 25° Angles | Heat Treated for Strength | Ideal for Precision Fastening | Handy Key Holder Included | Includes Sizes 1.5mm to 10mm
features: Ball End Design for Versatile Use: The unique ball point heads on these hex keys allow for operation at angles up to 25 degrees, providing exceptional maneuverability and ease of use in hard-to-reach areas. Ideal for a range of tasks, this design helps to make challenging jobs more manageable.

Enhanced Durability with Heat Treatment: Each hex key in this set is heat treated, a process that significantly enhances the strength and durability of the tool. This ensures that the hex keys maintain their shape and performance over time, even with frequent use.

Organized & Accessible with Handy Key Holder: The Key Set is neatly stored in a convenient key holder that keeps all the hex keys organized and easily accessible. The key holder features a compact and practical design that prevents the hex keys from getting lost or misplaced, ensuring that you always have the right size on hand when needed.

Comprehensive Set of Sizes for Versatility: This set includes nine essential hex key sizes: 1.5mm, 2.0mm, 2.5mm, 3.0mm, 4.0mm, 5.0mm, 6.0mm, 8.0mm, and 10mm. This diverse range of sizes ensures that you have the right tool for a variety of tasks and applications, from small, delicate adjustments to larger, more robust projects.

Ideal for Various Applications: The Dekton Hex Key Set is suitable for a wide range of applications, making it a valuable addition to any toolkit. Whether you are a professional tradesperson, an engineer, or a DIY enthusiast, these hex keys are designed to meet your needs for precision and reliability.
description: Product Description The Dekton Hex Key Set features ball point heads, allowing you to work at angles up to 25 degrees, making it ideal for tight spaces. Each key is heat treated for extra strength and durability, ensuring long-lasting performance even under heavy use. The set includes nine essential sizes: 1.5mm, 2.0mm, 2.5mm, 3.0mm, 4.0mm, 5.0mm, 6.0mm, 8.0mm, and 10mm, providing versatility for a variety of tasks. Stored in a handy key holder, the set keeps your tools organized and easily accessible, preventing loss and ensuring quick retrieval. This comprehensive set is perfect for professionals and DIY enthusiasts alike, offering reliable performance for mechanical repairs, assembly, and other applications. Box Contains 9PC BALL END SHORT HEX KEY SET
